recentArticles.title: Kris Jenner Shouts Out Kardashians' Exes on Father’s Day - TMZ
recentArticles.snippet: ### Taylor Swift's Rhode Island Mansion Dazzles with Fireworks, Amid Bachelorette Speculation. # Kris Jenner Shouts Out Kardashians' Exes on Father’s Day. **Kris Jenner** gave a wide-ranging Father’s Day tribute Sunday ... and it included several of her famous family’s exes, current co-parents, and loved ones in a single star-packed collage. The collage highlighted **Kanye West**, **Scott Disick**, **Travis Scott**, **Tristan Thompson**, as well as her own exes **Caitlyn Jenner** and **Robert Kardashian Sr**. She also took a moment to highlight her son, **Rob Kardashian**, praising his role as a father to daughter **Dream** ... The post stood out for its unusually inclusive approach, with Kris acknowledging multiple figures who have been part of her family’s extended circle over the years -- including several former partners of her children who share kids with the famous family. recentArticles.title: Virat Kohli Launches One8 Sportswear in Delhi with Signature ₹9,230 Shoe Tribute - Saptashwa TV
recentArticles.snippet: Virat Kohli has launched his latest venture One8 Sportswear at a global launch in Delhi to the huge audience of cricket fans, celebrities and industry leaders to celebrate. This is One8's first global launch as a brand and launch date that will go down in history within Agilitas Sports and will be the first time that One8 has become an independent label to launch a collection of high-performance cricket spikes, lifestyle shoes and apparel to be able to merge athletic function with city attire. The One8 Global Premiere in Delhi was more than a product launch; it was a celebration of Kohli’s legacy, his entrepreneurial vision, and the merging of sport, fashion and culture. With Kohli’s brand as One8 enters the next stage and as it goes through the transition from a product launch to a product launch, fans and consumers alike’ eyes and minds will be on board to see how Kohli’s brand will develop in the competitive sportswear arena.

recentArticles.title: Jelly Roll Lands Major TV Gig After Emotional Message To Bunnie XO - Yahoo
recentArticles.snippet: # Jelly Roll Lands Major TV Gig After Emotional Message To Bunnie XO. * Country music star Jelly Roll is set to guest host "Jimmy Kimmel Live!" during Jimmy Kimmel's summer hiatus, alongside other celebrities like Tiffany Haddish and Rosie O'Donnell. * Jelly Roll's wife, Bunnie XO, recently discussed their marriage struggles on a podcast, revealing that they are parting ways amicably and continuing their IVF journey. * Jelly Roll publicly confirmed the truth of Bunnie's podcast statements, expressed love for her, and addressed rumors of infidelity, stating that he is open to dating and encouraging fans to reach out. According to Bunnie, tensions came to a head following an argument on Mother's Day. While she stressed that infidelity played no role in their breakup, she admitted that frustration led her to tell Jelly Roll to file for divorce. Later that same night, Jelly Roll addressed the situation during a concert in New York, telling fans that everything Bunnie discussed on her podcast was "the truth." The singer also used the moment to express his appreciation for his wife.

recentArticles.title: Jason Momoa attends 'Supergirl' London premiere with kids, girlfriend - USA Today
recentArticles.snippet: Jason Momoa attends 'Supergirl' London premiere with kids, girlfriend. Jason Momoa is feeling the love in London from fans, family and even a cocktail bar. On June 18, the 46-year-old actor attended the premiere of the upcoming movie "Supergirl" in London's Leicester Square - the heart of the city's entertainment district. Momoa was joined by his son Nakoa-Wolf Momoa, 17; daughter Lola Iolani Momoa, 18; and girlfriend, "Blink Twice" actor Adria Arjona. The actor, known for his roles in "Game of Thrones" and "Aquaman," looked smart in a dark grey suit and waistcoat. Momoa plays intergalactic bounty hunter "Lobo" in the movie, who clashes with Supergirl - played by Milly Alcock who donned a white dress to Thursday's premiere. And it's not just fans that are excited about the new movie, a London bar that overlooks the red carpet just launched a new beverage to honor the actor just in time for Thursday's premiere: a giant fishbowl mimosa named "Jason Mamosa.".
recentArticles.summary: Jason Momoa attends 'Supergirl' London premiere with kids, girlfriend - USA Today

recentArticles.title: Trump Calls to Delay DNI Hearings, Demands Congress Passes FISA & SAVE Act - Military.com
recentArticles.snippet: # Trump Calls to Delay DNI Hearings, Demands Congress Passes FISA & SAVE Act. A hearing for intended new DNI Jay Clayton was urged at the president's discretion to halt as he urges Republicans to pass sweeping legislation. President Donald Trump on Wednesday called to delay hearings on Capitol Hill for Jay Clayton, his pick to become the United States' next director of national intelligence (DNI), due to Republicans' failure to shore up legislation combining surveillance laws and election security. Trump has been critical of Democrats on Capitol Hill who have pointed to the Pulte pick as impetus to not immediately renew Section 702 of the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act (FISA), which last Thursday was not extended in both the House and Senate. "However, the Republicans moved so fast with the hearings of the Great Jay Clayton, current U.S. Attorney for the Southern District of New York, that Pulte would be gone before the Dumocrats would vote on FISA.
recentArticles.summary: 這則新聞與周杰倫無關，主要報導美國總統川普要求延遲DNI聽證會並呼籲國會通過FISA法案。

recentArticles.title: Lou Williams Denies Jay-Z Influenced His Decision to Enter 2005 NBA Draft in Trending Post - Bleacher Report
recentArticles.snippet: # Lou Williams Denies Jay-Z Influenced His Decision to Enter 2005 NBA Draft in Trending Post. Rapper Jay-Z had "nothing to do" with his decision to declare for the 2005 NBA draft. Williams took to social media Saturday and responded to a rumor that Jay-Z was why he declared for the draft and said, "I'm Lou Williams. Jay z ain't have nothing to do with me declaring for no draft lol.". It should be noted Jay-Z may have at least had an indirect influence on Williams' decision even if the rapper didn't tell the guard to enter the draft or skip college, at least based on the player's own previous words. I kicked it with Jay for a night and I went to school the next day. And I was looking around the class, like, 'I'm nothing like none of y'all.' I start experiencing different s--t, so I was like, I'm not going to sit in another classroom after this.

recentArticles.title: Justin Gaethje Makes Announcement On His Fighting Future After Win At UFC Freedom 250 - Yahoo Sports Canada
recentArticles.snippet: # Justin Gaethje Makes Announcement On His Fighting Future After Win At UFC Freedom 250. The new UFC lightweight champion who scored an insane fourth-round TKO victory over Ilia Topuria at the White House in the main event of UFC Freedom 250 says he's looking to fight again. Gaethje was a guest on Joe Rogan's podcast and he talked about his future. ## Is Justin Gaethje Retiring After UFC Freedom 250? Gaethje will likely never be able to top the win he had over Topuria, but he still clearly believes he has more to offer and gain. On Rogan's podcast, Gaethje said, "Right now, I'm planning on it," when asked about a return, adding that nothing in him feels like it's over. His Freedom 250 win looked like a perfect exit, but he isn't taking it. Gaethje was blunt, saying "He doesn't get a rematch" and arguing the former champ quit on the stool while he stopped him twice.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導了UFC選手Justin Gaethje在UFC Freedom 250獲勝後對其未來格鬥生涯的規劃，與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.snippet: # Jason Momoa Joined by His Two Kids & Girlfriend Adria Arjona at ‘Supergirl’ Premiere in London. **Jason Momoa** has the support of his loved ones at his big event! The 46-year-old actor was joined by his two kids – son **Nakoa-Wolf**, 17, and daughter **Lola**, 18 – at the premiere of his new movie ***Supergirl*** on Thursday (June 18) held at Leicester Square in London, England. For the premiere, **Jason** sported a charcoal-gray suit, but soon took off his blazer to show off his buff muscles. His kids coordinated in black outfits. Also joining **Jason** at the premiere was his girlfriend **Adria Arjona**, who wore a plunging red dress. recentArticles.title: Jack Savoretti on 'leaning into a midlife crisis' - BBC
recentArticles.snippet: # Jack Savoretti on 'leaning into a midlife crisis'. Twenty years since his debut, Jack Savoretti, who lives near Chipping Norton in Oxfordshire, says he was "very prepared for nobody really caring" about his ninth album, We Will Always Be The Way We Were. Ahead of his autumn tour across Europe and the UK, the singer talks about writing songs for "the mothers and the fathers in the world" and his first collaboration with long-time friend KT Tunstall. Savoretti compares choosing the theme of the album to "a bit like leaning into a midlife crisis". "As great as the music is right now, there's not much that I listen to that I relate to. "I don't know if there's much music for all the mothers and the fathers in the world, especially for men," he says. "I really wanted to make an album that was useful to anybody in the afternoon of life.".
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞主要報導歌手Jack Savoretti的新專輯與創作理念，內容與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Carson Daly has career advice for son Jackson: ‘Become an electrician' - NBC New York
recentArticles.snippet: TODAY host Carson Daly and his wife Siri are about to hit a milestone with their oldest son, Jackson. “I think the key to parenthood for me, for fatherhood, is trying every single day how to figure out how to slow the hands of time,” Daly said at the the TODAY dads’ annual Father’s Day event at Swingers Crazy Golf in New York City. In two years now when he’s a freshman in college, the entire educational process of how or what he’s supposed to get out of a four-year university experience is completely changing in real-time.”. He said that Jackson “might benefit more from majoring in prompts of AI, learning how to use the technology to better a career.” He paused and added, “I’m trying to get him into a trade. I’m going to get an awesome condo right down the street, and you and I are going to have a great freshman year!’” Carson joked.
recentArticles.summary: 美國主持人Carson Daly分享了他對兒子未來職業規劃的看法，建議他考慮AI或技職，此資訊與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.title: MONSTA X’s Minhyuk Explores Love And Longing In New Single, ‘Reaching’ - Forbes
recentArticles.snippet: # MONSTA X’s Minhyuk Explores Love And Longing In New Single, ‘Reaching’. MONSTA X member Minhyuk has unveiled his new solo digital single, "Reaching," a sweet pop-rock ballad centered on love and deep connections. K-indie singer-songwriter Hyun-sang Ha penned and composed the track, specifically envisioning Minhyuk and his fans, hoping their sentiments would "reach him." Minhyuk's soft yet husky vocals beautifully intertwine with electric guitar riffs, steady drums, and acoustic melodies, evoking profound yearning and sincerity. Its "boyfriend-coded" music video shows Minhyuk in a tranquil forest with his guitar, a stark contrast to his previous EDM track "Ongshimi." This release highlights a surprisingly gentle, emotional facet of the energetic idol, perfectly resonating with his fanbase. Minhyuk of MONSTA X has released a new solo digital single, “Reaching,” a sweet message about love and exploring those connections. Minhyuk of MONSTA X’s new track “Reaching” is available on all streaming platforms.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞資訊主要關於MONSTA X成員Minhyuk發行新單曲《Reaching》，與周杰倫無直接關聯。
